title: Home Gym Tour in Costa Rica

chunks.title: Introduction and Gym Overview
chunks.summary: The video opens with an introduction where the host shares details about his home gym setup in Costa Rica. He explains his motivation for maintaining fitness and emphasizes the importance of mobility and functionality over sheer muscle size.
chunks.transcript: What's up guys? I just got done with a workout. I want to take you through my home gym here in Costa Rica. I'll show you the ins and the outs. Stay tuned to the end because I'm going to show you my favorite exercise that you are probably not doing. I sit way too much in Costa Rica. My hips are super tight. I'm going to show you an amazing exercise for that, but I'm going to show you all the gear in my gym. I got some interesting stuff that you've probably never seen. I'm going to show you some of my favorite movements that I use just to stay lean and mobile and strong. Most of the time I'm surfing. I surf every day. If I can find a wave somewhere, I'll go surf. Then just throughout the day as I'm working on podcast stuff, on research, on the book or the documentary, whatever I'm working on, on content, I'll take a break, come down here, do mobility stuff, do whatever I'm feeling. I'll just hang on the bar. I'll do some Nordic curls. I'll do a sprint. I'll hit the bag for five minutes. It's just kind of casual. I really like having a space that just feels like it's for play. I can come down and do whatever I want to work on, but my main goal is to get better at surfing. I'm trying that by surfing every day. I've got a skateboard ramp at my house that I like to practice on, but I prioritize mobility over muscle size. I want strength, but I want functionality at the same time. I don't want my strength to limit my mobility, especially for surfing, which is a challenging thing. You have to get into a lot of positions and it's a lot of balance. chunks.summary: The host discusses various pieces of equipment in his gym, including an ATG slant board and weights. He describes how he incorporates these tools into his warm-up routines to prepare for surfing activities.

chunks.summary: In this segment, the host highlights the importance of mobility and flexibility exercises, including hanging from a bar and using balance boards. He shares his daily routines that help him maintain agility for surfing.
